LanguageData.SimShopRole_Cashier.description: Responsible for cash register duty and related cashier work in the shop.
LanguageData.SimShopRole_Cashier.label: Cashier
LanguageData.SimShopRole_Restocker.description: Responsible for restocking shelves and organizing inventory.
LanguageData.SimShopRole_Restocker.label: Restocker
